questionEN: A developer needs to store simple local view state. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да пази просто локално state във view. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: @State пази source-of-truth state, притежаван от текущия view.
explanationEN: @State is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to let a child edit parent-owned state. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да позволи на child да редактира state от parent. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: @Binding свързва child view към state, който е собственост на друг view.
explanationEN: @Binding is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to arrange views vertically. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да подреди views вертикално. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: VStack поставя child views един под друг.
explanationEN: VStack is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to arrange views horizontally. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да подреди views хоризонтално. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: HStack поставя child views един до друг.
explanationEN: HStack is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to overlay views on top of each other. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да наслои views един върху друг. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ZStack рисува child views в дълбочина.
explanationEN: ZStack is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to show a short piece of text. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже кратък текст. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Text е стандартният SwiftUI view за текстово съдържание.
explanationEN: Text is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to show an SF Symbol. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже SF Symbol. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Image(systemName:) зарежда символ от SF Symbols.
explanationEN: Image(systemName:) is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to handle a tap action. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да обработи tap действие. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Button изпълнява action, когато потребителят го натисне.
explanationEN: Button is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to push content apart with flexible space. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да раздалечи съдържание с гъвкаво пространство. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Spacer заема свободното място в stack layout.
explanationEN: Spacer is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to display rows of data. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже редове от данни. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: List е подходящ за скролируеми редове и basic tables.
explanationEN: List is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to navigate between screens. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да навигира между екрани. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: NavigationStack управлява modern SwiftUI navigation.
explanationEN: NavigationStack is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to add inner spacing around content. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да добави вътрешно разстояние около съдържание. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .padding() добавя пространство вътре около view съдържанието.
explanationEN: .padding() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to change text style. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да промени стила на текст. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .font() контролира typography стила на SwiftUI text.
explanationEN: .font() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to change foreground color or style. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да промени foreground цвят или стил. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .foregroundStyle() задава визуален стил за текст, символи и shapes.
explanationEN: .foregroundStyle() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to draw a background behind a view. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да нарисува background зад view. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .background() поставя друг view зад текущия.
explanationEN: .background() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to make corners rounded. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да закръгли ъглите. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .clipShape() може да изреже view към RoundedRectangle или друга shape.
explanationEN: .clipShape() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to repeat UI for each model item. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да повтори UI за всеки model item. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ForEach създава views от колекция с разпознаваема identity.
explanationEN: ForEach is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to show scrollable vertical content. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже вертикално scroll съдържание. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ScrollView позволява съдържание по-голямо от екрана да се скролира.
explanationEN: ScrollView is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to show loading progress. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже loading progress. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ProgressView показва determinate или indeterminate progress.
explanationEN: ProgressView is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to read system values like color scheme. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да прочете системни стойности като color scheme. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: @Environment чете стойности, предоставени от SwiftUI environment.
explanationEN: @Environment is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to disable a control temporarily. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да деактивира control временно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .disabled(true) предотвратява interaction с control-а.
explanationEN: .disabled(true) is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to own an observable object for the lifetime of a view. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да притежава observable object за живота на view. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: @StateObject създава и пази observable object през view refresh-и.
explanationEN: @StateObject is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to observe an object owned elsewhere. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да наблюдава object, притежаван другаде. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: @ObservedObject е за object, който се подава отвън и не се притежава от view-а.
explanationEN: @ObservedObject is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to persist small view state per scene. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да запази малко view state за scene. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: @SceneStorage пази малки стойности, свързани със scene restoration.
explanationEN: @SceneStorage is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to persist a small user setting. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да запази малка user настройка. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: @AppStorage свързва SwiftUI state с UserDefaults key.
explanationEN: @AppStorage is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to present a modal screen. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже modal екран. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .sheet() представя modal view върху текущия context.
explanationEN: .sheet() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to show a confirmation message. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже confirmation съобщение. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .alert() показва system alert с actions.
explanationEN: .alert() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to run work when a view appears. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изпълни работа при появяване на view. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .task() стартира async работа, свързана с lifecycle на view.
explanationEN: .task() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to react to a state value changing. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да реагира на промяна на state стойност. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .onChange() изпълнява closure при промяна на наблюдавана стойност.
explanationEN: .onChange() is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to avoid unstable list updates. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избегне нестабилни list updates. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Стабилната identity позволява на SwiftUI правилно да diff-ва редове.
explanationEN: stable identity is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to build a grid of cards. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да построи grid от cards. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: LazyVGrid създава ефективен вертикален grid layout.
explanationEN: LazyVGrid is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to measure available size. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да измери наличния размер. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: GeometryReader дава достъп до размера и coordinate space.
explanationEN: GeometryReader is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to share matched animation identity. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да сподели matched animation identity. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: @Namespace създава identity scope за matchedGeometryEffect.
explanationEN: @Namespace is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to animate state-driven changes. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да анимира state-driven промени. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: .animation(_:value:) свързва animation с конкретна state стойност.
explanationEN: .animation(_:value:) is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to customize a button consistently. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да customize-не button консистентно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ButtonStyle капсулира pressed/normal presentation за buttons.
explanationEN: ButtonStyle is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to create reusable view modifiers. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да създаде reusable view modifiers. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ViewModifier капсулира повтарящи се view transformations.
explanationEN: ViewModifier is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to pass data up from children. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да подаде данни нагоре от children. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: PreferenceKey позволява child views да подават layout-related values към parent.
explanationEN: PreferenceKey is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to keep expensive work out of body. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да държи тежка работа извън body. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
answersBG: move work to model or task
answersEN: move work to model or task
correctAnswerBG: move work to model or task
correctAnswerEN: move work to model or task
explanationBG: body трябва да описва UI; тежка работа там води до чести преизчисления.
explanationEN: move work to model or task is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to support dynamic text sizes. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да поддържа dynamic text sizes. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Dynamic Type прави текста достъпен за потребителски настройки.
explanationEN: Dynamic Type is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to make a custom container layout. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да създаде custom container layout. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Layout protocol позволява собствен алгоритъм за измерване и подреждане.
explanationEN: Layout protocol is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to control transaction animation behavior. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да контролира transaction animation behavior. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Transaction носи animation context през view update.
explanationEN: Transaction is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to separate view from state logic. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да раздели view от state logic. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: ViewModel държи presentation state и actions извън SwiftUI view.
explanationEN: ViewModel is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to debug a view that redraws too often. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да debug-не view, който се redraw-ва твърде често. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Неправилен state ownership или нестабилна identity често причиняват излишни updates.
explanationEN: inspect state ownership and identity is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to reduce unnecessary row invalidation. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да намали ненужно invalidation на редове. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Стабилните Identifiable models помагат на List/ForEach diffing.
explanationEN: stable Identifiable models is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to avoid retaining a view model accidentally. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избегне случайно задържане на view model. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Stored closures могат да capture-нат objects; capture lists помагат при reference cycles.
explanationEN: review closure captures is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to coordinate a hero-style transition. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да координира hero-style transition. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: matchedGeometryEffect свързва geometry между два view states.
explanationEN: matchedGeometryEffect is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to profile animation hitches. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да профилира animation hitches. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Instruments показва CPU, rendering и frame timing проблеми.
explanationEN: Instruments is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to load data without blocking body. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да зареди данни без да блокира body. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Async work трябва да се стартира от task/lifecycle, не директно в body.
explanationEN: async task in lifecycle is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to handle cancellation when leaving a screen. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да обработи cancellation при напускане на screen. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: SwiftUI може да cancel-не task при изчезване на view.
explanationEN: check Task cancellation is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to make previews useful for many states. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да направи previews полезни за много states. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Preview fixtures показват loading, success и error states бързо.
explanationEN: preview fixtures is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to avoid putting navigation in every child. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избегне navigation във всеки child. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Central navigation state прави flow-а по-предвидим и testable.
explanationEN: central navigation state is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to build accessible custom controls. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да създаде accessible custom controls. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Custom controls имат нужда от label/value, за да са разбираеми за VoiceOver.
explanationEN: accessibility labels and values is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to honor Reduce Motion. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да уважи Reduce Motion. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Reduce Motion трябва да спира или намалява декоративни animations.
explanationEN: accessibilityReduceMotion is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to avoid layout jumps from async images. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избегне layout jumps от async images. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Стабилните размери предотвратяват reflow при зареждане.
explanationEN: reserve stable dimensions is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to share state across many screens carefully. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да сподели state между много екрани внимателно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Environment injection е полезен, но трябва да остане ясен и ограничен.
explanationEN: environment injection is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to keep render code deterministic. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да държи render code deterministic. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Random work в body прави UI updates непредвидими.
explanationEN: avoid random work in body is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to validate empty states. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да валидира empty states. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Empty states предотвратяват crash и дават ясен UX при липсващи данни.
explanationEN: safe fallback UI is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to support large lists efficiently. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да поддържа големи lists ефективно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Lazy containers създават views при нужда и пазят memory.
explanationEN: lazy containers is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to avoid overusing AnyView. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избегне прекомерна употреба на AnyView. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Concrete view types дават повече информация на compiler-а.
explanationEN: prefer concrete view composition is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to coordinate multiple animations predictably. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да координира много animations предвидимо. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Explicit value-based animations ограничават кога се анимира.
explanationEN: explicit animation values is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to test view model behavior. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да тества view model behavior. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: State transitions могат да се проверят бързо без UI automation.
explanationEN: unit tests around state transitions is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to isolate formatting logic. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да изолира formatting logic. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Изолиран formatting намалява duplicate UI code.
explanationEN: computed properties or formatters is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to design reusable components. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да проектира reusable components. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Малки focused views са по-лесни за preview, тест и промяна.
explanationEN: small focused views is the best fit here because it directly supports the described SwiftUI workflow.
